mapper.sql: mst.id, mst.name, mst.parent_id, mst.sort, mst.path, mst.component, mst.type, mst.perms, mst.icon, mst.status, mst.create_by, mst.create_time, mst.update_by, mst.update_time, mst.note
mapper.select: select from sys_role r inner join sys_user_role ur on r.id = ur.role_id where ur.user_id = #{userId}

select from sys_user_role ur join sys_role r on ur.role_id = r.id join sys_role_menu rm on r.id = rm.role_id join sys_menu mst on rm.menu_id = mst.id where ur.user_id = #{userId} and r.status = '0' and mst.status = '0' order by mst.parent_id, mst.sort
